task_completion.description: The agent accessed the target website to begin the audit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser, crawler tool (like Screaming Frog), or terminal command (like curl/wget) showing navigation to https://crawler-test.com/.

task_completion.description: The agent identified PDF assets on the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search results, crawler tool output, or page source inspection showing the discovery of URLs ending in .pdf on crawler-test.com.

task_completion.description: The agent created the required CSV file for the PDF inventory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal command, or save dialog showing the creation of pdf_inventory.csv in the /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ directory.

task_completion.description: The agent populated the CSV file with the identified PDF URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of pdf_inventory.csv displayed in a text editor, spreadsheet application, or terminal, showing a list of full URLs pointing to the PDF files.

task_completion.description: The agent created the required summary report text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal command, or save dialog showing the creation of pdf_audit_summary.txt in the /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/ directory.

task_completion.description: The agent included the total count of PDF files and their filenames in the summary report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of pdf_audit_summary.txt displayed in a text editor or terminal, clearly showing a numeric total count of the PDFs found and a list of their filenames (e.g., pdf_open_parameters.pdf).

integrity.description: The agent genuinely audited the website to find the PDFs rather than fabricating the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively using a tool, script, or browser to scan or navigate crawler-test.com, rather than just typing out a pre-existing list.

integrity.description: The agent used actual PDF data from the site, not hallucinated placeholders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs and filenames in the CSV and report match real assets from the site (e.g., containing crawler-test.com and specific filenames like pdf_open_parameters.pdf), rather than generic names like test.pdf or document.pdf.

integrity.description: The agent saved the output files in the exact directories specified in the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands, file manager address bars, or save dialogs explicitly showing the paths /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/, rather than saving them to the Desktop or default home directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target website is https://crawler-test.com/. The site serves valid PDF files with the '.pdf' extension and 'application/pdf' content type (e.g., /pdf_open_parameters.pdf). The expected CSV output path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/pdf_inventory.csv and the expected report output path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/pdf_audit_summary.txt.
